title: Precisely Tuned
description: Precisely tuned and perfected for pure performance.
body:
Only optimization mods — nothing else.
No new blocks. No items. No mechanics. No visuals.

This modpack is built entirely around performance, stability, and efficiency.
Expect higher FPS, smoother gameplay, faster loading times, reduced stutter, and better memory usage, all while keeping the game 100% vanilla in how it looks and plays.

Every mod included has one purpose:
to make the game run as smoothly as possible without changing how it feels.

Installation Steps: 

1. Install the Modpack in your desired version.

2. Go to [mrpack to ZIP converter](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/) and scroll to the bottom and attach the mrpack file you downloaded and press download to convert it into a zip.

3. Open your installation and copy everything inside the config and mods folder into their respective folders into the installation.

4. Boot up your game and enjoy an extremely smooth experience!

Notes: This modpack merely a base for performance, the user must still install their own mods as this modpack is almost identical to vanilla. Different versions may not have identical mods due to some not being updated at the time of release.
